name: IdsEdwProvTaxDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH CTE1 AS ( SELECT A.PROV_TAX_SK, A.PROV_ID, A.TAX_ID, A.EFF_DT_SK, A.PROV_SK, A.TAX_DMGRPHC_SK, A.TERM_DT_SK, COALESCE(CM.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_TAX A LEFT OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CM ON A.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=CM.CD_MPPNG_SK ) SELECT PROV_TAX_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD)='' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ID, TAX_ID, EFF_DT_SK AS PROV_TAX_EFF_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PROV_SK, TAX_DMGRPHC_SK, TERM_DT_SK AS PROV_TAX_TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM CTE1

Description:
Oliver Nielsen  09/10/2005    Originally Programmed

Annotations:
JOB NAME: IdsEdwProvTaxDExtr
Read all the Data from IDS PROV_TAX Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK
Write Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvTaxDLoad.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
